description:
Turn your voice into polished text.

Ultra-fast AI powered dictation that understands what you want to say and how you want to say it. Instantly turn speech into perfect emails, crisp notes, clear messages, professional communication, and more.
Features and Fixes
- Improved space insertion logic
- Add VAD state reset, should resolve repeated "no voice found" errors
- Add error notification for proper noun extractor initialization
- Add error notification for tray icon initialization
- Add quit option to recording window context menu
